---
title: "Shooting Charts Template"
author: "Noah Seaner"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(png)
library(base64enc)
library(htmlwidgets)

df <- read.csv([shooting dataset here], header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

df <- df %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  mutate(
    X2FG. = na_if(X2FG., "#DIV/0!"),
    X2FG. = as.numeric(X2FG.),
    X2FG. = replace_na(X2FG., 0),
    FT.   = na_if(FT., "#DIV/0!"),
    FT.   = as.numeric(FT.),
    FT.   = replace_na(FT., 0)
  )

df$Name <- trimws(as.character(df$Name))
df$Date <- trimws(as.character(df$Date))

players <- unique(df$Name)
dates   <- unique(df$Date)

court_img <- list(
  source = base64enc::dataURI(file = [background court image here], mime = "image/png"),
  xref = "x", yref = "y",
  x = 0, y = 0,
  sizex = 364, sizey = 281,
  sizing = "stretch",
  opacity = 1,
  layer = "below"
)

pct_color <- function(made, miss) {
  tot <- made + miss
  if (tot == 0) return("#A0A0A0")  
  pct <- made / tot
  r <- if (pct < 0.5) 1 else 2 - 2 * pct
  g <- if (pct < 0.5) 2 * pct else 1
  b <- 0
  rgb(r, g, b)
}

zones <- list(
  Layup   = list(x = 182, y = 250),
  TwoFG   = list(x = 182, y = 200),
  ThreeFG = list(x = 182, y = 75),
  FT      = list(x = 182, y = 150)
)

trace_meta <- data.frame(player = character(), date = character(), zone = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

fig <- plot_ly()

for (p in players) {
  for (d in dates) {
    row <- df %>% filter(Name == p, Date == d)
    if (nrow(row) == 0) next
    
    zone_info <- list(
      list(zone = "Layup",  made = as.numeric(row$GLUP),  miss = as.numeric(row$MLUP),  coord = zones$Layup),
      list(zone = "2FG",    made = as.numeric(row$X2FG),  miss = as.numeric(row$X2FGM), coord = zones$TwoFG),
      list(zone = "3FG",    made = as.numeric(row$X3FG),  miss = as.numeric(row$X3FGM), coord = zones$ThreeFG),
      list(zone = "FT",     made = as.numeric(row$FT),    miss = as.numeric(row$FTM),   coord = zones$FT)
    )
    
    for (z in zone_info) {
      color <- pct_color(z$made, z$miss)
      fig <- fig %>% add_markers(
        x = z$coord$x,
        y = z$coord$y,
        marker = list(size = 40, color = color, opacity = 1),
        text = paste0(p, "<br>", d, "<br>", z$zone, ": ", z$made, " made, ", z$miss, " missed"),
        hoverinfo = "text",
        visible = FALSE
      )
      trace_meta <- rbind(trace_meta, tibble(player = p, date = d, zone = z$zone)) 
    }
  }
}

default_player <- players[1]
default_date   <- dates[1]
default_visible <- (trace_meta$player == default_player & trace_meta$date == default_date)

for (i in seq_along(fig$x$data)) {
  fig$x$data[[i]]$visible <- default_visible[i]
}

combo_keys <- trace_meta %>%
  distinct(player, date)

combo_menu <- list(
  buttons = apply(combo_keys, 1, function(row) {
    p <- row["player"]; d <- row["date"]
    vis <- (trace_meta$player == p & trace_meta$date == d)
    list(
      method = "update",
      args = list(
        list(visible = vis),
        list(title = paste0(p," — ",d))
      ),
      label = paste(p, d)
    )
  }),
  direction = "down", x = 0.3, y = 1.1, showactive = TRUE
)

menus_full <- list(combo_menu)

# --- Layout ---
fig <- fig %>%
  layout(
    images = list(court_img),
    title = paste0(default_player," — ",default_date),
    xaxis = list(range = c(0, 364), showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, visible = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(range = c(281, 0), showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, visible = FALSE, scaleanchor = "x"),
    updatemenus = menus_full
  )

fig

htmlwidgets::saveWidget(fig,[name of dashboard here])
```
